data.title: Graceland Portable Buildings Appoints Frank Long as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: In Cunningham, Kentucky, on April 15, 2026, Graceland Portable Buildings, a prominent producer and supplier of portable storage structures, has named Frank Long as its latest Chief Financial Officer. With more than 20 years of experience in financial management, Frank will be assuming the new role at the company.

data.title: Jury verdict: Live Nation monopoly, major music industry impact. 5 key points from antitrust trial.
data.description: In a recent trial, a jury determined that the concert company had effectively functioned as a monopoly. This ruling carries significant implications for the music sector, potentially impacting various aspects of the industry.

data.title: PACSUN INTRODUCES ITS SUN-DRENCHED SWIM STATE OF MIND
data.description: Pacsun, a specialty fashion retailer known for its focus on youth culture, has recently launched a new collection in Los Angeles on April 15, 2026. The collection features a blend of relaxed layers, sun-faded prints, and effortless swim styles that are meant to go beyond just beachwear. This new line aims to bring a softer and more relaxed energy to swimwear, appealing to a younger demographic.

data.title: Positive assay results at Golden Eye point to growth in Indicated Resources
data.description: Recent test results from the Golden Eye deposit within the Chibougamau Project revealed significant findings, with intervals showcasing up to 105.5 grams per ton of gold equivalent over a 1.0 meter span. This highlights the promising potential for valuable resources within this deposit.

data.title: Woodward Announces Agreement to Sell Its Pilot Controls Product Line to Ontic Engineering and Manufacturing
data.description: Woodward has recently revealed plans to sell its Pilot Controls Product Line to Ontic Engineering and Manufacturing. This deal signifies a significant shift in Woodward's operational focus, with the sale including a range of products central to their Pilot Controls division. The transition will see Ontic Engineering and Manufacturing taking over these products, indicating a strategic decision by Woodward to streamline its offerings. This move will affect a specific number of employees currently working in the Pilot Controls Product Line, as they will be transferring to Ontic Engineering and Manufacturing as part of the agreement. The financial details of the deal have not been disclosed publicly as of now.

data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, the company has released its preliminary financial results and business update as of March 31. data.title: CFTC-approved Bitnomial launches Injective futures, starting 6-month track for potential INJ ETF approval.
data.description: Bitnomial has introduced US-regulated Injective futures, marking the start of a six-month monitoring period required for Canary Capital's upcoming spot INJ ETF application. This development is a significant step forward in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Herbalife Announces Pricing of $800 Million Aggregate Principal Amount of Senior Secured Notes Offering
data.description: Herbalife Ltd., a worldwide health and wellness company, disclosed the pricing of its recent offering through its subsidiaries HLF Financing SaRL, LLC and Herbalife International, Inc. The offering consists of $800 million aggregate principal amount of senior secured notes due 2033, known as the "Notes," which were priced at 100.00% of par for the public. The Notes come with a fixed annual interest rate of 7.750%.

data.title: Oasis Welcomes ISS Support for Independent Investigation at Kao EGM and Responds to Kao’s Latest Disclosures: Why Every Shareholder Should Vote FOR Independent Investigators on April 30
data.description: In Hong Kong, Oasis Management Company Ltd., which manages private funds holding a 12.5% stake in Kao Corporation, has expressed positivity as proxy advisor ISS recently suggested shareholders support the nomination of independent investigators at the upcoming Kao Extraordinary General Meeting. ISS emphasized significant worries related to supply chain risks, regulatory compliance, and governance issues as reasons supporting the proposal. Cheers from Oasis Management on the ISS recommendation.

data.title: STATEMENT FROM LIVE NATION ENTERTAINMENT
data.description: On April 15, 2026 in Los Angeles, the recent jury verdict is just one step in the legal process. The final decision on liability and damages will depend on upcoming motions. Live Nation plans to file a motion for judgment soon, pending additional legal proceedings to determine the validity of the current rulings. This development follows a series of hearings and the Court is expected to rule on these matters with potential impact on the case's outcome.
